segments.text: Another down smash—watch out for the plant's neutral B and the tether recovery here, no wait, no tether on that—the neutral B!
segments.original_text: Otro downsmash, cuidado aquí con el neutral B de la planta y con el strap, no, que no tiene el strap, el neutral B

full_text: Another down smash—watch out for the plant's neutral B and the tether recovery here, no wait, no tether on that—the neutral B!
